roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox, safe update controller and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer miniapps and imported-subscription lifecycle with normalized reseller growth settings
roles.processor: advanced schedules, auto-renewal, service health, reseller tiers, backups, campaigns and background reports

features: repairs Processor from the central bot by testing the current runtime, deploying processor/worker.js from GitHub when needed and retrying the Service Binding
prevents D1 telemetry writes from converting a successful Processor request into a false failure
isolates every Processor business job so one optional task cannot stop all scheduled processing
returns exact Processor repair error, action, version and deployment state in the Telegram repair result
marks repair status completed only when all five repair groups, including Processor, actually succeed
keeps normalized reseller_growth_settings and all previous D1 recovery protections

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot; no manual D1 action is required
deployment.processor_repair_flow: current runtime test -> automatic Processor deploy -> source verification -> repeated runtime test -> business job execution

limitations: production Cloudflare, Telegram and PasarGuard calls were not executed without account credentials
automatic Processor repair still requires the PROCESSOR_WORKER Service Binding and stored Cloudflare/GitHub deployment settings
